name: Video Prompting
description: Write clear, model-aware prompts and reference plans for text-to-video and image-to-video generation.

poster.alt: Video Prompting workflow assigning reference roles and separating identity, visible motion, and camera intent into a testable prompt package.

animation.alt: Animated Video Prompting workflow composing locked identity, visible motion, camera intent, negatives, and timing into a master prompt.
